nasb.text: but you say, ‘If a man says to his father or his mother, whatever I have that would help you is Corban (that is to say, given to God),’

esv.text: But you say, ‘If a man tells his father or his mother, “Whatever you would have gained from me is Corban”’ (that is, given to God)—

cnv.text: 你們倒說：‘人對父母說，我應該給你的供奉，已經作了各耳板’，

ccb.text: 你们却认为人若对父母说，‘我把供养你们的钱财已经全部奉献给上帝了’，

csbs.text: 你们却说‘如果一个人对父亲或母亲说：我本该给你的，已经做了“各尔板”——这意思是“圣殿奉献”，
